title: Medvel minecraft
description:
Explore in the medieval era! play with strategy
as you get power points on the map! do fort raids and build your fort up and add cannons, walls of many blocks thick and create ARMYS! Engage in war and also naval tactics if thats what you want!
body:
Explore in the medieval era! play with strategy
as you get power points on the map! do fort raids and build your fort up and add cannons, walls of many blocks thick and create ARMYS! Engage in war and also naval tactics if thats what you want! Or play peacefully and make alliances with other nations who will help you! or be a bloodthirsty nation who fights every nation on sight with massive armys and cannons, you create alliances and you betray them!
